title: The Nagaland University Act, 1989
full_text: The Nagaland University Act, 1989 नागालैंड विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1989 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1989-35 Act Number: 35 Enactment Date: 1989-10-20 Act Year: 1989 Short Title: The Nagaland University Act, 1989 Hindi Title: नागालैंड विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1989 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University in the State of Nagaland and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 06-09-1994 Notification: 6th September, 1994, vide notification No. S.O. 644(E), dated 6th September, 1994, see Gazette of India, 1994, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Nagaland University Act, 1989 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. The University. Section 4. Objects of the University. Section 5. Transfer of properties of North-Eastern Hill University. Section 6. Powers of the University. Section 7. Jurisdiction. Section 8. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 9. The Visitor. Section 10. The Chief Rector. Section 11. Officers of the University. Section 12. The Chancellor. Section 13. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 14. The Pro-Vice-Chancellor. Section 15. Deans of Schools. Section 16. The Registrar. Section 17. The Finance Officer. Section 18. Other officers. Section 19. Authorities of the University. Section 20. The Court. Section 21. The Executive Council. Section 22. The Academic Council. Section 23. The Planning Board. Section 24. The Boards of Schools. Section 25. The Finance Committee. Section 26. Other authorities of the University. Section 27. Power to make Statutes. Section 28. Statutes how to be made. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Power to make Ordinances. Section 30. Regulations. Section 31. Annual report. Section 32. Annual accounts. Section 33. Transfer of services of certain employees of the North-Eastern Hill University. Section 34. Conditions of service of employees. Section 35. Procedure of appeal and arbitration in disciplinary cases against students. Section 36. Right to appeal. Section 37. Provident and pension funds. Section 38. Disputes as to constitution of University authorities and bodies. Section 39. Constitution of Committees. Section 40. Filling of casual vacancies. Section 41. Proceedings of University authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 42. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 43. Mode of proof of University record. Section 44. Power to remove difficulties. Section 45. Transitional provisions. Section 46. Completion of courses of studies in Colleges or Institutions affiliated to the University. Section 47. Statutes, Ordinances and Regulations to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament. Section 48. Repealed. Schedule 1.
